name: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite

price.provider: Google AI Studio / Vertex AI (Gemini API)

note: Ultra-cheap 3.x tier for high-volume workloads at $0.25/$1.50 per million tokens, 1M context.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real: preview launched 2026-03-03 (blog.google, fetched), all 3 benchmark numbers (GPQA 86.9, MMMU-Pro 76.8, Arena Elo 1432) literally confirmed on that page. Pricing $0.25/$1.50 confirmed independently. CORRECTED status from 'preview' to 'released': the model reached general availability ~2026-05-07/08 (cloud.google.com GA blog, fetched) and the original preview checkpoint was deprecated/shut down 2026-05-25 (ai.google.dev docs, fetched) — as of today (2026-07-12) the model is GA, not preview. CORRECTED modalities: added 'video' — the official model docs page (ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/models/gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview) confirms input modalities as Text, Image, Video, Audio, and PDF, so 'video' was missing from the original record.
